description_long: This is an adult male figure with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. He is dressed in a long-sleeve crewneck shirt and straight-cut pants, both of which fit loosely. The figure has a full beard and short hair, with defined facial features and a neutral expression. His footwear consists of athletic sneakers with a thick sole, and his hands are open and relaxed. The overall appearance is casual and modern, suitable for an urban environment such as a sidewalk or park.
description: A casually dressed adult male standing upright in a T-pose, wearing a long-sleeve shirt, pants, and sneakers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and full arm span with open hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the straight posture, and the side of the clothing and shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, pants, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, the straight posture, and the side of the clothing and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
